title: alangium bussyanum
intro: Alangium bussyanum, also known as the Yellow Allamanda or Yellow Trumpet Vine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other compounds that have been found to have antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Alangium bussyanum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
